data.name: Climber Arborist Labor Rate
data.description: Standard hourly rate for climbing arborist performing pruning and technical tree dismantling.
data.notes: Includes standard safety climbing harness and basic ropes.
data.productionNotes: Double-check overhead electric lines before rigging.
assumptions: Standard access permitted within 50 feet of job location.
exclusions: Municipal permit filing fees (unless explicitly selected).
